TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Saisiyat, story: SaiNr-frog6_kalaeh a _oemaw

S.FORM: hini' ka 'aehoe' kita' ka takem hiza'.
S.TRANSL: 這隻狗看著青蛙。
This dog was looking at that frog.

S.FORM: korkoring ka kitkita' ila ka 'aehoe'.
S.TRANSL: 小孩一直看著狗。
The child was looking intently at the dog.

S.FORM: kita' koSa: kano' hiza k a kano' ka kita' ka takem.
S.TRANSL: 小孩看著青蛙。
The child was looking at the frog.

S.FORM: takem kas'oehaz ila.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙跑了出來。
The frog came out.

S.FORM: hini' korkoring ma'rem.
S.TRANSL: 小孩去睡覺。
The child went to sleep.

S.FORM: kano' kaybae:en nia hini' nia kaybae:en.
S.TRANSL: 他的衣服。
These were his clothes.

S.FORM: haehoeway hini' ma hini' haehoeway.
S.TRANSL: 也有他的鞋子。
These were his shoes too.

S.FORM: nia haehoeway ilahini min'itol ila ka.
S.TRANSL: 他的鞋子在這裡 ...
His shoes were here ...

S.FORM: korkoring kita' naehaen ila hini' ray krwaSekan noka takem ro takem 'oka' ila i: kita'i.
S.TRANSL: 當他起來後,他找不到青蛙。
When he woke up, he couldn't find the frog in the container.

S.FORM: hini' kaybae:en ma' ray ra ray ra:i' kabih 'askan ma pin pababoe:es.
S.TRANSL: 衣服散佈在地上。
The clothes were scattered all over the floor.

S.FORM: hini' 'aehae' korkoring mari' ka kano' hiza' nisia sisilin babaw.
S.TRANSL: 小孩拿起什麼,舉起來。
The child took his what-is-it and lifted it up.

S.FORM: hini' 'aehoe' haysia kita' ma moiti' ila o ray noka a takem ray krwaSekan kita' 'oka' ila ka takem.
S.TRANSL: 狗還在看,把頭塞到養青蛙的瓶子裡,可是沒看到青蛙。
The dog was still watching and stuck (its head) into the container where the frog had been, but it saw that the frog was not there.

S.FORM: ra:iw ila.
S.TRANSL: 不見了。
(It) was gone.

S.FORM: hini' haysia ila ma pataboe' ray ka'alingo'an hiza' ka kapsaraloman a.
S.TRANSL: 他的頭還是卡在裝水的地方。
Its head was still stuck inside the bottle.

S.FORM: korkoring hini' haewaeh ka hinoehas.
S.TRANSL: 小孩打開窗戶。
The child opened the window.

S.FORM: 'oe'oe ka 'oe'oe ka mae'iyaeh ra:amen.
S.TRANSL: 他叫,青蛙會知道。
And called out (the window). (The frog) will know by his calling.

S.FORM: hini' ka 'aehoe' haysia 'ima pataboe' ray ka'askanan ka ralom.
S.TRANSL: 狗的頭還是卡在放水的地方。
The dog's head was still stuck inside the container.

S.FORM: korkoring kas kita' yo 'oka' ka mae'iyaeh.
S.TRANSL: 小孩沒有看到人。
The boy saw that there was nobody.

S.FORM: 'insa'an nisia hiza' mlakay ila ka binbinisitan hiza' ka kap raloman.
S.TRANSL: 被用來放水的瓶子破了
The bottle that was used to contain water broke.

S.FORM: hiza' ka 'aehoe' kayzaeh ila nisia mari'in 'aewpoe'oen ila.
S.TRANSL: 狗沒事,小孩拿起狗帶著他。
The dog was all right; the boy took him up and carried him.

S.FORM: korkoring hiza' 'oe'oe 'aehoe' ma hiza' hinghae' 'oyae' ma tobong.
S.TRANSL: 小孩叫,狗也吠叫。
The child called out; the dog also barked along.

S.FORM: tobong hiza' 'am mwai' a hini' ray kaehoey hayza ka boya' mwai'.
S.TRANSL: 狗在叫的時候,有蜂從樹那邊來。
As the dog was barking, there were bees coming from the tree.

S.FORM: hayap ila hini' isahiza hoema hayapen noka boya' ila hiza' hilasia 'oe'oe komoSa: hiza' ka boya' isahini 'aehoe' kita' ka boya' twa'is tobong ka boya'.
S.TRANSL: 當他們一直叫時,蜂在飛,狗繼續對蜂吠叫當他看到他們過來時。
The bees were hovering above while they kept on calling and the dog continued barking at the bees when it saw them (coming).

S.FORM: a hiza' korkoring ra:am komoSa: boya' a 'aseng ka mae'iyaeh sia masroko'.
S.TRANSL: 小孩知道蜂會叮人,(所以)他就彎下。
The child knew the bees sting, and he bent down.

S.FORM: hini' 'aehoe' rima' tete: ka hini' ka kahoey ray tinonon noka boya' hiza'.
S.TRANSL: 狗搖有蜂窩的樹。
The dog shook the tree with the beehive.

S.FORM: bo:ya' te'te'en mwai' ka kas'oehaz ka ka'ina'an.
S.TRANSL: 搖了後,蜂跑出來了。
(After the dog) shook (the tree), the bees came out.

S.FORM: hini' ka 'aehae' ka korkoring ma mamtikot ka 'aseng hiza'.
S.TRANSL: 小孩害怕蜂叮他
The child was afraid that the bees might bit him.

S.FORM: hihimi'an hini'.
S.TRANSL: 他很安靜。
He kept quiet.

S.FORM: ka 'aewhaes kas'oehaz em ma kita' 'ima komoSa: kano'.
S.TRANSL: 老鼠跑出來,看到什麼。
A mouse came out and saw what happened.

S.FORM: e kita' ka korkoring towa'isin te'te'en hini' ka boya' sahae' ila.
S.TRANSL: (狗)繼續搖樹,蜂窩掉了下來。
(The dog continued to) shake (the tree), and the beehive fell down.

S.FORM: kaina'an hini' kas'oehaz saboeh.
S.TRANSL: 蜂全出來了。
The bees all came out.

S.FORM: hini' ka 'aewhaes ma kas'oehaz hiza'.
S.TRANSL: 老鼠也出來了。
The mouse also got out.

S.FORM: korkoring rima' hosail ila hini' ray kaehoey ray roro' 'am rima' ila hao ray roro' o: 'izo'.
S.TRANSL: 小孩去躲在樹洞裡。
The child went to hide up the hole in the tree.

S.FORM: rima' ila hao ray kaehoey ray roro:.
S.TRANSL: 他走向樹洞。
He went toward the hole in the tree.

S.FORM: kita' ka 'oewi' homses hini' korkoring sahae' ila.
S.TRANSL: 小孩看到貓頭鷹,掉下去了。
The child, seeing the owl, fell down.

S.FORM: hiza' kas'oehaz kitaen ka 'oewi'.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹出來了。
The owl came out.

S.FORM: hini' 'aehoe' sowawon noka boya' mamra:iw ila.
S.TRANSL: 蜂追狗,然後離開了。
The bees chased the dog and it ran away.

S.FORM: 'ima asengen ila noka boya' isaa ra:iw ila.
S.TRANSL: 蜂叮狗,然後離開了。
The bees were stinging the dog, and it ran away.

S.FORM: hini' ka 'oewi' hiza' hayap.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹飛。
The owl flew (away).

S.FORM: korkoring yo hini' homses ila.
S.TRANSL: 小孩嚇到了。
The child got surprised.

S.FORM: 'ima 'oe'oe a ka kano' ka 'aehoe' a kano' mwai' hiza' 'okik ra:am mwai ka wae'ae' ila hiza'.
S.TRANSL: 他不知道鹿來了
He did not know the deer was coming.

S.FORM: isahiza rima' papama' ray wae'ae' babaw.
S.TRANSL: 小孩騎在鹿上。
The child rode on top of the deer.

S.FORM: a hiza' papama' ray wae'ae' babaw.
S.TRANSL: 他騎在鹿上。
He rode on top of the deer.

S.FORM: a ma'onhael a ki 'aehoe' lasia ra:iw ila.
S.TRANSL: 鹿和狗一起離開了。
Together with the dog, the deer left.

S.FORM: hini' 'ima sia 'ae'ae:aew ila longa'nga' rima' ray tangob.
S.TRANSL: 他突然亂跑到懸崖邊。
Then it suddenly ran away toward the cliff.

S.FORM: hiza' korkoring ki 'aehoe' hiza 'okik ra:am ma homses si'intani' hiza sahae' ila ilahini ray ray 'ataS.
S.TRANSL: 小孩和狗不知道(他們在哪裡),很害怕;鹿停了下來,他門掉到懸崖下。
The child and the dog did not know (where they were) and were frightened; the deer stopped and they fell off the cliff.

S.FORM: ra 'aehoe' ma isaa losalaz a malobaz ila sahae' ila 'oyae'.
S.TRANSL: 狗也重重地一起掉下去。
The dog fell heavily and fell together with the child.

S.FORM: mti' kano' ila hini' hini' kaehoey ila nonak ray hiza' ray 'ataS babaw.
S.TRANSL: 在懸崖上有很多樹。
There were many trees above the cliff.

S.FORM: hini' wae'ae' 'ima paykosizaeh kita' ka ima sahae' ka mae'iyaeh ki 'ahoe'.
S.TRANSL: 當小孩和狗掉下去時,鹿在上面看。
The deer was on top of the cliff watching the boy and the dog fall down.

S.FORM: a maylal'oz ka ray wasal lasia sahae' hiza' ila.
S.TRANSL: 他們掉到下面。
They fell down below.

S.FORM: lalangoy ila ray ralom.
S.TRANSL: 他們在水裡游泳。
They swam in the water.

S.FORM: hiza' 'aehoe' nisia mari'in pahangal palalangoy ila.
S.TRANSL: 小孩拿著狗帶著他,使他游泳。
The boy took the dog and carried it up. He made it swim.

S.FORM: ni hayza 'aehae' ka kaehoey.
S.TRANSL: 有一根木頭。
There was a piece of wood.

S.FORM: rima' lasia ray langi kita' ka hini' ka kaehoey hini' a roro:.
S.TRANSL: 他們走去邊邊,看到樹裡有一個洞。
They went to the side and saw a hole in the piece of wood.

S.FORM: a rima' ila papama' ray kaehoey babaw n taba:ai.
S.TRANSL: 他們走到枯木的上面。
They went over the top of the piece of dead wood.

S.FORM: na mwai' 'ima papama' ray atabai babaw ra yo kita' ila naehaen ka takem kamasal roSa' ila.
S.TRANSL: 他們爬過枯木的上面,看到兩隻青蛙。
They climbed over the top of the dead wood and saw two frogs below.

S.FORM: hinap hini' 'aehae' korkoring ma 'iya rakep ka takem a 'ima ampowa' kita' ka 'ima.
S.TRANSL: 小孩想要抓青蛙。
The boy wanted to catch one frog.

S.FORM: raroton hiza' ka takem.
S.TRANSL: 為什麼青蛙聚集在哪裡呢?
Why did the frogs gather there.

S.FORM: kitkita' a ki 'aehoe' hiza' hini' 'aehoe' 'oe'oe ila ka.
S.TRANSL: 狗叫。
The dog barked.

S.FORM: korkoring hini' 'ima 'oe'oe ka hini' takem.
S.TRANSL: 小孩在叫青蛙。
The child called out to the frog.

S.FORM: 'ima komoSa: hini' hayza naehaen nisia hiza' takem a 'aehae' rakepen ila.
S.TRANSL: 有他的 ... 他抓了一隻青蛙。
There was his ... he took one frog.

S.FORM: lasia hini' ma kakminitkita' koSa: powa' iza 'oe'oe hiza'.
S.TRANSL: 他們一直看,為什麼一直叫?
They were watching, and asked why he kept calling.

S.FORM: sia 'ima bilis ka takem 'aehae'.
S.TRANSL: 小孩拿走一隻青蛙。
The child took one frog away.

S.FORM: lasia 'ima bazbazae' ila.
S.TRANSL: 他們在聽。
They were listening.

S.FORM: 'oka' ila.
S.TRANSL: 沒有了。
It's finished.
